name: SlTree
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from extract/pilots/shoelace/custom-elements.json (components/tree/tree.js) (cem adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: selection
props.description:
The selection behavior of the tree. Single selection allows only one node to be selected at a time. Multiple
displays checkboxes and allows more than one node to be selected. Leaf allows only leaf nodes to be selected.

events.name: selectionChange
events.description: Emitted when a tree item is selected or deselected. (CEM event "sl-selection-change")
